title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 60.441 - Descriptions involving more than one zone
text:
60.441.  Descriptions involving more than one zone. — When any tract of land to be defined by a single description extends from one into another of the coordinate zones, the positions of all points on its boundaries may be referred to as either of the zones and the zone which is used shall be specifically named in the description.
(L. 1984 S.B. 479, A.L. 2023 H.B. 202 merged with S.B. 138)
